title: Boolean Algebra and Logic
description: The logic operators behind every digital circuit: AND, OR, NOT, XOR, NAND and NOR; reading and building truth tables; and the Boolean laws (including De Morgan's) used to simplify expressions.
objectives: Evaluate expressions using the AND, OR, NOT, XOR, NAND and NOR operators
Construct and read truth tables for Boolean expressions of up to three inputs
State and apply the core Boolean identity, complement, commutative, associative and distributive laws
Apply De Morgan's laws to negate and rewrite Boolean expressions
Simplify Boolean expressions to a minimal equivalent form
